case_title: TOWN CENTER STORAGE, LP VS. SCOTTS VALLEY GREEN BUILDERS, INC. ET AL
cause_of_action: PETITION RE: ARBITRATION (PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD)

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF RESPONDENTS RE NON-OPPOSITION TO PETITIONER TOWN CENTER STORAGE LPS PETITION TO CONFIRM CONSENT AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON (TRANSACTION ID # 66734541) FILED BY PETITIONER TOWN CENTER STORAGE, LP
MINI MINUTES FOR JUL-27-2021 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-27-2021 HEARING RE: PETITIONER TOWN CENTER STORAGE, LP'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONSENT AWARD AND ENTER JUDGMENT THEREON, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PETITION GRANTED. ORDER SIGNED. SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/EPS)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioner Town Center Storage Lps Petition To Confirm Consent Award And Enter Judgment Thereon
Off Calendar Jul-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER TOWN CENTER STORAGE, LP's Petition To Confirm Consent Award And Enter Judgment Thereon.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Petition granted pursuant to Respondent's declaration of non-opposition.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/EPS)
